name: coODGetSigned
title: coODGetSigned
syntax: long coODGetSigned( dword index, dword subIndex, dword errCode[] );
description: Returns the value of an object in the local object dictionary with a leading sign. This function can only be applied to objects with the data types 0x2, 0x3, 0x10, and 0x4.
For the use of this function, a note on handling should be considered.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the object, value range 1..65.535
